* Each color needed 192 units of material since 48 tiles multiplied by 4 colors equals 192.  
* The painter required 20 bottles of each color because 192 divided by 10 gives 19.2, which rounds up to 20.  

The process involved careful calculation to ensure no color ran out. A palindrome like "level" can be found in many artworks. The story of the painter was quite hell to imagine for Leonardo.
